case_title: LIDIA RAMIREZ et al VS. P.F.L.P. (PAULSEN FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP) et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, LIDIA MALDONADO, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PP & M TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., DBA P & S TOWING *** DEFENDANT PAULSEN FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFFS. THE NAME OF DEFENDANT P & S TOWING IS AMENDED TO "PP & M TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., DBA P & S TOWING". THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW BY A PREPONDERENCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT THE DEFENDANT P & S TOWING CAUSED THE DAMAGES TO THE CAR. THE FIRST OWNER, IN WRITING, ACKNOWLEDGED THAT THE DAMAGES WERE EXISTING BEFORE THE CAR WAS TOWED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-01-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PP & M TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., DBA P & S TOWING

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PAULSEN FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (NAME OF DEFENDANT IS AMENDED TO PPAM TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., DBA P & S TOWING, BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-09-2009 AT 8:30AM. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-03-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT P AND S TOWING AND RECOVERY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT PP & M TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., DBA P & S TOWING
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, LIDIA MALDONADO, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT PP & M TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., DBA P & S TOWING
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, LIDIA MALDONADO, CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO PP & M TOWING & RECOVERY, INC. DBA P & S TOWING.
